ad_copy.headline: Where Vision Becomes Reality
ad_copy.body_copy: At WECRAFT Constructions, we transform ideas into architectural masterpieces. Discover the art of premium construction.

variations.label: Variation A - Primary
variations.headline: Where Vision Becomes Reality
variations.body_copy: At WECRAFT Constructions, we transform ideas into architectural masterpieces. Discover the art of premium construction.

variations.label: Variation B - Emotional
variations.headline: Building Dreams, One Detail at a Time
variations.body_copy: Every structure tells a story. Let WECRAFT Constructions craft yours with precision and passion.

variations.label: Variation C - Direct
variations.headline: Premium Architecture, Perfected
variations.body_copy: Experience the WECRAFT difference. Exceptional design, flawless execution. Your vision, our expertise.

visual_direction.layout_description: Central architectural image with bold headline overlay, clean and minimal design
visual_direction.composition: Centered architectural photograph with headline positioned at the top third, CTA at the bottom
visual_direction.color_usage: Primary brand colors with neutral backgrounds to highlight the architecture
visual_direction.typography_usage: Archivo Medium for headline, Inter Regular for body copy, clean hierarchy
visual_direction.imagery_style: High-end architectural photography with dramatic lighting and clean lines

image_generation_prompt.stable_diffusion: Architectural masterpiece, modern building with clean lines, dramatic lighting, premium materials, centered composition, 1:1 aspect ratio, ultra-realistic, professional photography, elegant and sophisticated mood
image_generation_prompt.midjourney: Architectural photography of a modern building with clean lines and premium materials, dramatic lighting, centered composition, 1:1 aspect ratio, ultra-realistic, sophisticated and elegant mood, professional photography style
image_generation_prompt.negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, cartoonish, text, people, clutter, busy background, amateur photography

zones.bottom: Call to action button or text

layout_spec.spacing_notes: Use generous margins to create breathing room, ensure text doesn't overlap with image edges

brand_compliance_notes: Maintain premium and professional aesthetic, use brand colors sparingly to highlight key elements, ensure typography hierarchy is clear and readable
ab_testing_tips: Test different headline variations to see which resonates most, experiment with image styles (interior vs exterior shots), try different CTA placements and colors
